tagline: How overseas AI apps won — in numbers and repeatable steps.

case.painPoint: The pain point, and how they found it
case.premiumLead: Why it worked and the numbers behind it — all free to read for now.

about.lead: A media site that breaks down winning overseas AI-app case studies into ‘numbers’ and ‘repeatable steps.’
about.p1: Abroad, solo developers keep using AI to land apps fast and earn thousands to tens of thousands of dollars a month. Yet curated information is scarce. So we gather it here.
about.p2: Not just stories. We structure each case into ‘how they found the pain point,’ ‘the repeatable playbook,’ ‘the tech used,’ and ‘marketing tactics,’ so you can compare and search across them. Less inspiration, more steps you can copy this weekend.
points: Overseas AI-app cases, structured in English (+Japanese)
Compare by revenue, time-to-grow, category, and tactic
Sources cited; full deep-dive analysis free to read
